name: ticks_hit_threshold_lock_engages
description: current_hold_ticks transitions from 4 -> 5 via this tick increment. 5 >= HWM_HOLD_TICKS_THRESHOLD (5), so breakeven_locked flips from False to True. Pins the lock-transition. Once locked, stop_trigger_level is floored at 0.0.
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.0. threshold = 0.8. current_return (1.5) >= 0.8 -> ticks++ -> 4 + 1 = 5. 5 >= HWM_HOLD_TICKS_THRESHOLD (5) AND not currently_locked -> new_breakeven_locked = True. Locked AND base_stop_level (-0.25) < 0 -> stop_trigger_level = max(-0.25, 0.0) = 0.0 (floored). Catches an impl that uses strict `>` instead of `>=` for threshold check (would NOT lock at exactly 5), and an impl that omits the floor when locked (would emit -0.25).
